name: SINUSOIDAL OBSTRUCTION SYNDROME
definition: SOS = venoocclusive disease blockage of small hepatic venules
discriminating_features: heterogeneous enhancement ← altered perfusion in areas of increased sinusoidal pressure
small obstructed hepatic venules NOT visible at imaging
heterogeneous liver with areas of increased signal intensity on T2WI ← edema

CECT: heterogeneous enhancement ← altered perfusion in areas of increased sinusoidal pressure
small obstructed hepatic venules NOT visible at imaging
MR: heterogeneous liver with areas of increased signal intensity on T2WI ← edema
